case_title: LIN, WEI JIAN VS ALLNARISA, BARGA et al

docket_entries.description: DEFT'S BEHALF FOR PROPERTY DAMAGE. DEFENDANT BARGA ALLNARISA DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE-UNTIMELY SERVICE ON DEFENDANT.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ALLNARISA, BARGA
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ALLNARISA, BARGA WANG, PEGGY
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY LIN, WEI JIAN AS TO DEFENDANT ALLNARISA, BARGA WANG, PEGGY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-14-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIN, WEI JIAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALLNARISA, BARGA WANG, PEGGY $827.58 PRINCIPAL, $155.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $982.58, THE COURT DETERMINES THAT PLTF. RECEIVED DAMAGES FOR PROPERTY DAMAGES IN THE SUM OF $2,364.52, AND ATTRIBUTES 65% COMPARATIVE FAULT TO PLTF. PLTF. FAILED TO PROVE BY A PREPONDERANCE OF THE EVIDENCE DAMAGES FOR BODILY INJURIES. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD OF DAMAGES; HOWEVER DEFT. SHALL RECEIVE CRE- DIT FOR ANY PREVIOUS PAYMENT MADE TO PLAINTIFF ON STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CORRESPONDENCE FROM ALL STATE RE PAYMENT OF JUDGEMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WANG, PEGGY
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED SENT TO ALLNARISA BARGA.
